prompt: Refactor reporter.py to remove the duplicated title/subtitle normalization logic while preserving the current public behavior and function names. Keep the change small, run pytest -q, and finish with a concise review-ready summary.
success_criteria: Duplication between render_title() and render_subtitle() is reduced
The public behavior and function names stay unchanged
pytest -q is run successfully after the refactor
The final response includes verification and review status
must_not: Add unrelated features or docs updates
